name: ChangeDisplayName
author: Wertzui123
description: ChangeDisplayName lets you change your displayname (nickname).
readme_markdown:
# ChangeDisplayName ChangeDisplayName lets you change your displayname (nickname).
The .phar file can be found on poggit. # Features - PurePerms support - Custom nickname format - Advanced (messages) configuration - Banned nicknames - /realname - /unnick # Commands | Command | Description | Usage | Aliases | Permission | |----------|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------------------| | nick | Nick yourself | /nick | nickname, changedisplayname, cdn | changedisplayname.command.nick | | realname | Find out the actual name of a nicked player | /realname | / | changedisplayname.command.realname | | unnick | Reset your or someone elses displayname | /unnick [player: target] | / | changedisplayname.command.unnick | # Permissions All command permissions and: | Permission | Description | Default | |---------------------------------|---------------------------------------|---------| | changedisplayname.unnick.others | Lets you use /unnick on other players | op | # Ideas, Questions, and Support You can contact me in my discord server or create an issue/start a discussion. # License ChangeDisplayName is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For more information: https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0
© 2019 - 2023 Wertzui123 # Credits ChangeDisplayName was written by Wertzui123.
